PowerShell($query = 'SELECT status, "errorMsg", "endpoint", "syncedAt" FROM "MobileSyncRecord" ORDER BY "syncedAt" DESC LIMIT 20;'; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("$env:TEMP\\q2.sql", $query\); cd "C:\\Users\\Gabriel Kwaku Kusi\\Downloads\\Jokas\\packages\\db"; npx prisma db execute --file "$env:TEMP\\q2.sql" --url "postgresql://jokas:jokas_dev_password@localhost:15432/jokas_erp?schema=public" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=jokas_dev_password psql -h localhost -p 15432 -U jokas -d jokas_erp -c 'SELECT fb.id, fb.code, fb.name, fb."poultryHouseId", COUNT\(bpa.id\) as pen_alloc_count FROM "FlockBatch" fb LEFT JOIN "BatchPenAllocation" bpa ON bpa."flockBatchId" = fb.id WHERE fb."deletedAt" IS NULL GROUP BY fb.id, fb.code, fb.name, fb."poultryHouseId";')

Bash(PGPASSWORD=jokas_dev_password psql -h localhost -p 15432 -U jokas -d jokas_erp -c "SELECT r.name, r.level, array_agg\(p.key ORDER BY p.key\) as permissions FROM \\"Role\\" r JOIN \\"_RolePermissions\\" rp ON rp.\\"B\\" = r.id JOIN \\"Permission\\" p ON p.id = rp.\\"A\\" GROUP BY r.id, r.name, r.level ORDER BY r.level;")
